particulars.description: All that freehold land being wickford library and wickford community centre, market road, wickford SS12 0AG as the same is registered with title absolute at the land registry under title number AA28516; and. 2. all that freehold land forming part of the willowdale centre, market road, wickford SS12 0RA as the same is registered with title absolute at the land registry under title number EX193750 and as is more particularly described in a transfer dated 20 december 2021 made between (1) sheet anchor investments limited and (2) the company.
